name: photobrief
description: Create AI-guided photo requests and look up pricing, plan limits, and FAQ content via MCP.

auth.description: Workspace API key (prefix pb_) issued on the Business plan.

tools.name: create_request
tools.description: Create a photo request and return a recipient URL the business can forward.

tools.name: lookup_pricing
tools.description: Return current PhotoBrief plans, monthly and annual prices, and per-plan request quotas.

tools.name: read_faq
tools.description: Return canonical FAQ answers for businesses and recipients.

fallback.note: Until the live MCP endpoint ships, agents should call the REST endpoint documented in /openapi.json.
